(embedded source map)\n```\nThis pattern is common in modular JavaScript projects, often used to aggregate exports for easier consumption elsewhere. The embedded source map (via data URI) is typical for debugging, especially in transpiled or minified code.\n\n---\n\n### Confirmed Issues:\n- **Presence of source map embedded as data URI:** All reports correctly identify this.
